title: Proposed notice for 6 CCR 1007-1
agency: Hazardous Materials and Waste Management Division
summary: The week of 9/9 a stakeholder indicated that some stakeholders did not receive the Division's notification of the April comment period or that the Board granted the Department's request for rulemaking and set a hearing for 9/18; the Division confirmed that a small number of stakeholders did not receive the notifications. Stakeholders are an integral part of the rulemaking process and the Department wants all stakeholders to have the opportunity to review and provide feedback on proposed rules.
